heading: Period of effectiveness
label: 8719 Period of effectiveness
text: This subchapter shall be effective beginning with the 2008 crop year of each covered commodity through the 2012 crop year.
notes: Codificationand enacted identical sections. was repealed by .Pub. L. 110–234Pub. L. 110–246Pub. L. 110–234section 4(a) of Pub. L. 110–246
